DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF JOHN LUM ARCHITECTURE, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANTS ASIA SF, LLC, HASHBARGER, YOUNG, AND LOCKAMY TO RESPOND AND PRODUCE DOCUMENTS IN RESPONSE TO DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION; AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS. ARGUED AND THE COURT TOOK THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. AFTER HEARING, THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANTS RESPONSE TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS DENIED. REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS BY BOTH PARTIES DENIED. DEFENDANT TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER.

OPPOSITION TO THE DEMURRER TO THE FIRST AMENDED COPMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN LUM ARCHITECTURE, INC

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS ASIA SF, LLC, LARRY HASHBARGER, WILBUR YOUNG, AND GREGORY K. LOCKAMY'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT OF JOHN LUM ARCHITECTURE, INC. IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD EXHAUSTION OF THE MEDIATION/ ARBITRATION REMEDIES IN THE WRITTEN CONTRACTS, OR SPECIFIC FACTUAL ALLEGATIONS SHOWING WAIVER. SEE CAREAU & CO. V. SECURITY PAC. BUSINESS CREDIT, INC. (1990) 222 CAL. APP. 3D 1371. PLAINTIFF MUST ALSO PLEAD WHICH DEFENDANTS ARE LIABLE UNDER EACH CONTRACT AND WHAT DAMAGES ARE DUE UNDER EACH CONTRACT. DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO 2ND, 3RD AND 4TH CAUSES OF ACTION. (MOVING PARTY MAY PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

IS CONTINUED TO NOVEMBER 10, 2010 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 302. ALL PARTIES TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. (SF LOCAL RULE 2.6B.)
